name: looper
description: Write tight Codex orchestration loops that use Matt Pocock Skills for implementation and review lanes.

interface.shortDescription: Write tight agent loops for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Looper writes compact Codex orchestration loops over plans, beads, slices, subagents, review/fix passes, and proof. It requires Matt Pocock Skills to be installed because its default code lanes call matt-pocock-skills:implement and matt-pocock-skills:code-review.
defaultPrompt: Use Looper to write a Codex loop.
Turn this plan into implementation slices.
Write a loop using Matt Pocock skill lanes.
